CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REQUESTING FILING OF A SMALL CLAIM. RECEIVED & FILED.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-13-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 REQUEST FOR MORE TIME TO SERVE TRIAL OF JAN-23-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF AMENDING NAME AND ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT AND REQUEST FOR A RESET DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-03-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-13-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-09-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOCH, LAUREN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPPRTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHMOUD, TAYSEER A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOCH, LAUREN PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
